description: CompositionBlue sweater made of 100% cotton, has a black round ribbed neck, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs which have black, blue and purple panels, ribbed hem and brand tag above the left hemFitRegularWash careHand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shadeCool iron if neededProudly display your brand statement with this fabulous sweater from provogue. The pure cotton fabric is sure to keep you feeling fresh all day, while the full sleeves keep you warm on your evening walks. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
